title: rosa × sabinii f. doniana
intro: Rosa × sabinii f. doniana, also known as Doniana or Don's Rose, is a hybrid rose species that is a cross between Rosa × sabinii and Rosa gigantea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Rosa × sabinii f. doniana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
